original_snippet_context: An article discussing the political and parliamentary responses to recent events in Sergipe, particularly concerning the deposition of the state's president and vice-president and the federal government's intervention.
relevant_quote: O governo não precisa de um volo da Camara para intervir em Sergipe, a não ser que venha no Congresso pedir directa ou indirectamente a decrelação do estado de sitio alim de poder restabelecei' mais rapidamente a ordem constitucional ali perturbada de modo tão grave.
justification: This statement objectively describes the government's constitutional power to intervene in Sergipe without requiring a vote from the Camara, except if requesting a state of siege, focusing on procedural aspects rather than expressing a clear opinion on the economic implications related to the "Caixa de Conversão".
